name: @nicechunk/chunk-js
description: Standalone WebGL2-first voxel renderer foundation for NiceChunk.

scripts.check: npm run check:policy && node tools/check.mjs && npm test
scripts.test: node tests/forge-spatial.test.mjs && node tests/smoke.test.mjs && node tests/voxel-fracture.test.mjs && node tests/forge-runtime-cache.test.mjs && node tests/forge-cloth.test.mjs && node tests/forge-dyes.test.mjs && node tests/ncm-blueprint.test.mjs && node tests/ncm-character.test.mjs && node tests/ncm4-avatar-renderer.test.mjs && node tests/building-parser.test.mjs
